data.title: CPSC Posts Product Recalls to its Web Site
data.description: Today, the U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) has disclosed the recall of 17 Stories Furniture 14-Drawer Dressers due to safety concerns. Consumers are urged to visit www.cpsc.gov for more information on this recall and others facilitated in collaboration with the respective firms involved.

data.title: Announcement of the ordinary general shareholders meeting Urbo bankas UAB for the year 2026
data.description: Urbo Bank UAB, identified by the company code 112027077 and headquartered at Konstitucijos pr.18B in Vilnius, is the subject of this news information.

China expressed its regret after the United Nations (UN) Security Council failed to adopt a resolution on the Middle East proposed by Russia for an immediate halt of military activities in the region, Permanent Representative to the United Nations Fu Cong said on Wednesday.

data.title: Catalyst/SMH High Income Fund Performance Recognized with 2026 LSEG Lipper Fund Award
data.description: Catalyst Capital Advisors recently revealed that the Catalyst/SMH High Income Fund (HIIIX) has secured a prestigious 2026 Lipper Fund Award. This recognition highlights the exceptional performance and management of the fund in delivering high income to investors. This achievement further solidifies the fund's reputation for excellence in the financial industry.

data.title: Radioligand Therapies Market Set for Significant Growth by 2034, Driven by Rising Cancer Burden and Targeted Radiopharmaceutical Innovation | DelveInsight
data.description: The radioligand therapy market is projected to experience substantial growth in the foreseeable future. This growth is driven by a rising number of cancer diagnoses among patients, heightened awareness surrounding radioligand therapies, and an increasing number of such therapies in development. The sector is expected to witness notable expansion as more individuals are diagnosed with cancer, with an increasing emphasis on the benefits and potential of radioligand therapies.

data.title: Food Encapsulation Market worth $21.79 billion by 2030 - Exclusive Report by MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, on March 12, 2026, data from MarketsandMarkets™ revealed that the worldwide food encapsulation market reached a value of USD 14.50 billion in 2025. It is forecasted to hit USD 21.79 billion by 2030, showing a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8.5% between 2025 and 2030.

data.title: SOCRadar positioned as a Leader in the SPARK Matrix™: Exposure Management, 2025 by QKS Group
data.description: The QKS Group's SPARK Matrix™ offers a comparative evaluation and ranking of prominent Exposure Management providers. SOCRadar, known for its advanced technology and exceptional customer service, has achieved impressive scores in technology proficiency and customer influence. It stands out among its competitors in the industry.

data.title: LINCOLN THE LAWYER RELEASES NEW ROCK/FOLK/SURF ALBUM "TIME MACHINES"
data.description: In San Diego, a vibrant new album titled "Time Machines" by local musician Lincoln the Lawyer is set to be released digitally on Wood Chip Records. The album will be available on all major streaming platforms. Stay tuned for the engaging music and talent of Lincoln the Lawyer.

data.title: Eoptolink Demos IMDD 400G per Lambda Based 1.6T DR4 Optical Transceiver Solution at OFC 2026
data.description: Eoptolink Technology Inc., Ltd., headquartered in Los Angeles, introduced its cutting-edge IMDD 400G per-lambda technology during the 2026 OFC event. This new innovation features the 1.6T DR4 OSFP transceiver. As a global frontrunner in optical interconnect solutions, Eoptolink showcased its next-generation product at the event.

data.title: Sound and Emotion - Scout Motors Invents an Emotionally Connected Sound Experience
data.description: In the automotive industry, the integration of audio notes in vehicles has been found to significantly improve the driving experience. The incorporation of sound in a vehicle can establish a deeper emotional bond between drivers, passengers, and their vehicle, making the journey more engaging. The audio design serves as an immersive and emotional tool for enhancing the overall driving experience. Scout Motors, a notable player in the industry, is dedicated to ensuring that the same level of care and meticulous attention to detail applied in other aspects of vehicle design is also channeled into the audio component.  This approach underscores the importance of audio features in vehicles and how they contribute to the overall ambiance and satisfaction of those within the vehicle.

data.title: First Hope Bank Appoints Ronna Marchello as Vice President, Market Manager
data.description: First Hope Bank has recently appointed Ronna Marchello as the Vice President and Market Manager for the Sparta, Andover, and Hackettstown markets in New Jersey. This move aims to enhance the bank's leadership in these areas. Ronna Marchello will be responsible for overseeing operations and strategic direction in these markets. This appointment comes as part of the bank's efforts to strengthen its presence and services.

data.title: Bitcoin stabilizes near $70,000 as chances of March Fed rate cut drop below 1%, oil remains volatile amid Middle East tensions.
data.description: Bitcoin prices remained steady in response to stable US economic data, while the price of oil continued to fluctuate due to uncertainty surrounding the ongoing conflict in the Middle East.

data.title: FATF cautions offshore crypto firms can facilitate money laundering with regulatory gaps, making tracking illicit activities difficult.
data.description: According to a recent report from the FATF, cryptocurrency exchanges that operate outside of traditional jurisdictions can contribute to gaps in anti-money laundering (AML) enforcement. This can pose challenges for regulators in monitoring and detecting illicit activities within the crypto space. By operating offshore, these exchanges may be less compliant with AML regulations, presenting difficulties for authorities seeking to address financial crimes. The report underscores the importance of enhancing collaboration and oversight to address these concerns effectively and ensure the integrity of the financial system.

data.title: BlackRock debuts staked Ethereum ETF on Nasdaq, providing spot exposure & staking yield with 0.12% fee on initial $2.5B.
data.description: BlackRock's iShares Ethereum Trust ETF is set to be listed on the Nasdaq exchange. This ETF will provide investors with exposure to the Ethereum cryptocurrency and staking income. Investors can take advantage of a reduced fee of 0.12% on the initial $2.5 billion invested in the ETF.

data.title: LZE GmbH Introduces Fraunhofer’s RFicient® Technology to the Market
data.description: German-based company, LZE GmbH, is broadening its technology transfer offerings by introducing the RFicient® ultra-low-power wake-up receiver technology from the renowned Fraunhofer Institute for Integrated Circuits IIS as a standard chip for industrial applications. This innovative solution facilitates energy-efficient designs for Internet-of-Things (IoT) devices, allowing them to maintain connectivity with minimal power consumption, operating in the range of microamps. This advancement is crucial in extending the lifespan and reducing maintenance requirements for IoT products.

data.title: Ripple is repurchasing shares at a $50B valuation; Binance refutes Wall Street Journal's report.
data.description: Ripple is currently conducting a share buyback program at a valuation of $50 billion. On the other hand, Binance is refuting recent reports from the Wall Street Journal.

data.title: Is Bitcoin Heading To $40,000? Analyst Warns Potential Weakness Into April
data.description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) has been consolidating within a range for the past several months, as market participants analyze short-term price movements to gain insights into the longer-term trajectory. Analyst Benjamin Cowen highlighted in a recent podcast on March 11 that bear markets for Bitcoin exhibit a unique pattern, where prices tend to rise before sharp drops. Contrary to expectations, Bitcoin tends to spend more time moving upwards during bear markets, leading to temporary rallies lasting weeks or even months. These rallies often create a sense of optimism, potentially misleading investors into believing a new bull market has commenced before a sudden downturn pushes prices to lower lows. Cowen emphasized that this behavior makes it challenging to identify bear markets in real-time due to these periodic rebounds that can deceive investors. For the detailed story, visit Benzinga.com.
